creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text: I tried running "valgrind --tool=memcheck dtrace -n 'pid$target:libc*:mallc:entry' -c /bin/cat" and don't see any segfaults or use-after-free reports.  (Valgrind is in much better shape now than it used to be.)  Since this report is quite old and we don't have any known stability problems, let's close it.
